items.title: Lana Del Rey Claims Stove Has a “Companion Album”
items.summary: “I need a month to finish putting it together. Thank you for waiting.”

items.title: Watch Robyn Cover Erasure’s “Always”
items.summary: The Swedish star dropped by BBC Radio 2 today to perform the 1994 synth-pop classic alongside three of her own songs

items.title: New David Bowie Collection to Feature Unreleased Songs with Jimmy Page
items.summary: The Shel Talmy Recordings gathers material the late singer, then going by Davie Jones, made with the titular producer in 1965

items.title: Suno Got Hacked
items.summary: The AI music generator reportedly scraped millions of songs and lyrics from YouTube, Deezer, and Genius
